bench_setup.notes: Stage 2 wiring verify. Firmware runs GPIO, UART, and ADC loopback tests internally. Pass/fail and per-wire error bitmask read from mailbox at 0x2000FC00 via SWD. On FAIL: error_code bitmask: bit0=GPIO_HIGH (PA8=H→PA6 read L), bit1=GPIO_LOW (PA8=L→PA6 read H), bit2=UART (PA9→PA10 mismatch/timeout), bit3=ADC_HIGH (PB0=H→PB1 ADC<3000), bit4=ADC_LOW (PB0=L→PB1 ADC>1000).

peripheral_signals.notes: GPIO loopback driver, output push-pull. Wire: PA8 → PA6.
GPIO loopback receiver, input floating. Wire: PA8 → PA6.
USART1 TX, AF7, 115200 8N1. Wire: PA9 → PA10.
USART1 RX, AF7. Wire: PA9 → PA10.
GPIO output drives ADC input via wire. Wire: PB0 → PB1.
ADC1 channel 9 analog input. Wire: PB0 → PB1.
